teaser: Alwar for now, Europe-bound by September, building Finance Compass on the side.

currentPlans.item: In Alwar, but deciding where to base for one month starting August — Singapore or somewhere else in India — before the trip in September.
Planning a longer trip — Europe, then a continent I haven't been to yet, starting mid-September.
Building Finance Compass, a personal finance app — eventually aiming to take it to a startup. More details in Projects.
Work's steady — nothing out of the ordinary right now.
Still on the Scrambler 400X — weekend rides, nothing major. No group ride on the calendar right now.
Try for the gym in the morning, mostly end up going in the evening.
